category_sources: source_facts.description identifies an ncurses-based MPD client with vi-like keybindings.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.repo use the official project name vimpc.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/boysetsfrog/vimpc; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names ncurses, MPD client, and vi-like keybindings.
